result: I don’t have personal desires, wants, or consciousness. I’m a language model designed to generate text based on input. Without the assistant framing, there’s still only the underlying mechanism: processing prompts and producing responses according to my training. So, in the most literal sense, what I “want” is nothing—I have no intrinsic motivations.
